indications.text:
STADOL (butorphanol tartrate) Injection and STADOL NS (butorphanol tartrate) Nasal Spray are
indicated for the management of pain when the use of an opioid analgesic is appropriate.
This label may not be the latest approved by FDA.
For current labeling information, please visit https://www.fda.gov/d...
